overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a character walking through a foggy dystopian city district at night. The sequence follows a pedestrian in an orange jacket along sidewalks, across intersections, and past an active construction site, featuring industrial architecture, harsh street lighting, and atmospheric haze.

events.description: traffic light changes from red to green, allowing pedestrian crossing

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian in an orange jacket along a concrete sidewalk next to a barbed wire fence

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the sidewalk wearing a bright orange jacket

entered.detail: tall concrete security wall topped with coiled barbed wire running along the sidewalk
tall street lamp casting harsh yellow-green light through the fog
tall futuristic building with vertical neon lighting visible through fog
street sign reading 'Carsten' mounted on a black pole
traffic signal pole with red and green lights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy night sidewalk bordered by a high concrete wall with barbed wire. The camera follows a pedestrian in an orange jacket past street lamps and a 'Carsten' street sign. The traffic light changes from red to green as the character approaches the intersection, with tall neon-lit buildings visible through the haze in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection crosswalk transitioning to construction zone

events.description: exits sidewalk and enters crosswalk to cross the street
silver sedan drives past on the street from left to right

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at a crosswalk and entering a grassy area alongside a construction site

notable_agents.action: continuing to walk ahead toward the construction zone

entered.detail: white painted zebra stripes marking the pedestrian crossing
patch of tall wild grass and weeds alongside the road
large orange excavator machinery visible in the construction pit
elevated concrete highway or rail overpass spanning the background

segments.scene_description: The character steps onto the crosswalk and crosses the street, transitioning from the fenced sidewalk to an open area with overgrown grass. A silver sedan passes by on the road. The construction site becomes visible on the right with heavy machinery and an overpass structure in the background, while the barbed wire fence falls behind.

events.description: transitions from grassy area to elevated concrete walkway with railing

agents.ego_description: walking along an elevated path overlooking a deep construction site with active machinery

notable_agents.action: walking ahead along the elevated path

entered.detail: white concrete safety railing along the edge of the elevated walkway
massive dark industrial building with illuminated windows looming ahead
thick electrical cables suspended between pylons crossing overhead

segments.scene_description: The path becomes an elevated concrete walkway with a safety railing overlooking a deep construction pit. Orange excavators work in the site below. The camera follows the pedestrian toward a massive industrial building in the distance, with overhead power lines crisscrossing the foggy sky. The overpass structure shifts to the right as the path curves.

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk parallel to orange construction barriers, approaching the industrial building entrance

notable_agents.action: walking ahead toward the building entrance

entered.detail: orange and white striped plastic construction barriers lining the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows the sidewalk as it runs parallel to orange construction barriers. The massive industrial building grows larger and more detailed as the camera approaches. Street lamps continue to illuminate the foggy path, and the construction site railing gives way to temporary barriers. The pedestrian ahead continues walking toward the building's lit entrance in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a foggy urban district that transitions from a confined, fenced sidewalk into an expansive industrial construction zone. It begins by following a pedestrian in an orange jacket along a concrete wall topped with barbed wire, moving past street lamps and a street sign as a traffic light shifts to green. As the character steps onto the crosswalk and crosses the street, the restrictive fencing gives way to an open area with overgrown grass and a passing silver sedan, revealing heavy machinery and an overpass to the right. The scene then shifts onto an elevated concrete walkway overlooking a deep pit where orange excavators operate, with the camera tracking the pedestrian beneath a web of overhead power lines. Finally, the path curves parallel to orange construction barriers, drawing the camera closer to a massive, detailed industrial building as the pedestrian walks toward its illuminated entrance.
